title: USEC_ENCODE
text: USEC_ENCODE Encode the contents of InBuf and place the result in OutBuf . Return Values USEC_SUCCESS Encode successful, no info returned USEC_ERROR Encode failed, error returned in Error members Description Encode the data in InBuf of length InDataLen . The encoded data must be placed in OutBuf and its length in OutDataLen , which must be less than or equal to OutBufLen . If the output buffer is not large enough to hold the encoded data, return an error. SMTP For an SMTP driver, this function is called after successful initialization. It is given the message that is to be sent to the SMTP server and it returns a message that is signed, encrypted, or reformatted . Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
